violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Boxes of open wraps on floor in walk in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove plastic from inside front doors on 2 door prep cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside front 2 door prep cooler. -Slicer needs cleaned more thoroughly.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside of fan cover in walk in cooler.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Box of cups on floor in dry storage.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and floor drains need more thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floor tiles have cracks by dish wash area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
